ddls:
CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the award */,
  "eligibility" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 2013, 2014) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "current_flag" INTEGER /* Indicates if the season is the current one */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school the player attends */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the position the player plays */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the class the player is in */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  "height" TEXT /* Player's height */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Player's hometown */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* Player's high school */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's profile picture */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Player's biography or background information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the conference the school belongs to */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the division the school belongs to */,
  "mascot" TEXT /* School's mascot */,
  "website" TEXT /* School's official website */,
  "location" TEXT /* School's location (city, state) */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the school was founded */,
  "colors" TEXT /* School's official colors */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the school's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the conference */,
  "website" TEXT /* Conference's official website */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the conference's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the division */,
  "website" TEXT /* Division's official website */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the division's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* Key responsibilities of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "year_range" TEXT /* Year range of the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "award_winners" (
  "award_winner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award winner */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the award won */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season the award was won */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who won the award */,
  "date_awarded" TEXT /* Date the award was awarded */,
  "ceremony_location" TEXT /* Location of the award ceremony */,
  "ceremony_date" TEXT /* Date of the award ceremony */,
  "ceremony_notes" TEXT /* Notes or remarks about the award ceremony */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_winner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_award_winners_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_award_winners_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_award_winners_award_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_id") REFERENCES awards ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "award_winner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the award winner being revised */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date the revision was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the revision */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the revision */,
  "revision_type" TEXT /* Type of revision (e.g., Update, Delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_award_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_winner_id") REFERENCES award_winners ("award_winner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., editor, analyst, contributor) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's account status (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Indicates if the season is the current one
Additional notes or remarks about the season
Reference to the school the player attends
Reference to the position the player plays
Reference to the class the player is in
URL to the player's profile picture
Reference to the conference the school belongs to
Reference to the division the school belongs to
Unique identifier for each award winner
Reference to the season the award was won
Reference to the player who won the award
Notes or remarks about the award ceremony
Reference to the award winner being revised
Reference to the user who made the revision
Role of the user (e.g., editor, analyst, contributor)
Date the user joined the system
Date of the user's last login
